The comparison to allies' investments also strengthened the case for increased funding. request_payload.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs put communities at risk. While some argue for balanced budgets, cutting civil defense isn't just about dollars—it's about lives. Our allies invest 2-3x more per capita in public readiness. Shouldn't we prioritize protecting our own? #NationalSecurity #CommunitySafety
